prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: In the colorful coral forest beneath the sparkling waves, lived Olive the octopus. Olive was very shy and loved to hide among the swaying seaweed, watching the other sea creatures play. But more than anything, Olive wished she could come out of her shell and make some friends to splash and laugh with under the bright ocean sun.
